title: What is the maximum limit of characters in tooltip
author: RastogiNishant
body:
## 💬 What is the maximum limit of characters in tooltip

I'm using a tooltip message as below
`If relevant please add public certificate category for this unit category. To make it work you should use the same public certificate category that you used for all similar units in the unit category. Tip: Use "+" like "I+II" for combined public certificate category.`

but using this lengthy message corrupts my dynamic excel, so I would like to know what is the maximum characters limits when setting the tooltip.
